ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "programme" TEXT /* Program of study */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of study */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average (GPA) of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the student */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the student */,
  "citizenship" TEXT /* Citizenship status of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_programme FOREIGN KEY ("programme") REFERENCES programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty member */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the faculty member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the faculty member belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the faculty member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the faculty member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the faculty member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scholarships" (
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scholarship */,
  "scholarship_name" TEXT /* Name of the scholarship */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scholarship */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the scholarship */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Eligibility criteria for the scholarship */,
  "application_requirements" TEXT /* Application requirements for the scholarship */,
  "application_deadline" TEXT /* Application deadline */,
  "disbursement_schedule" TEXT /* Disbursement schedule for the scholarship */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program the scholarship is associated with */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department offering the scholarship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_scholarships" (
  "student_scholarship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student-scholarship record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "scholarship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scholarship */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Status of the application (e.g., applied, recommended, awarded) */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date the student applied for the scholarship */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the scholarship was recommended to the student */,
  "award_amount" REAL /* Amount of the scholarship awarded */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date the scholarship award was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_scholarship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_scholarships_scholarship_id FOREIGN KEY ("scholarship_id") REFERENCES scholarships ("scholarship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_scholarships_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "application_forms" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each application form */,
  "student_scholarship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student-scholarship record */,
  "transcript" TEXT /* File path to the transcript */,
  "essay" TEXT /* File path to the essay */,
  "recommendation_letter" TEXT /* File path to the recommendation letter */,
  "financial_aid_form" TEXT /* File path to the financial aid form */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the application was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the application form (e.g., submitted, under review, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_application_forms_student_scholarship_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_scholarship_id") REFERENCES student_scholarships ("student_scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_scores" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application form */,
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the evaluator */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score given by the evaluator */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the evaluator */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluation (e.g., completed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scores_evaluator_id FOREIGN KEY ("evaluator_id") REFERENCES evaluators ("evaluator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_scores_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES application_forms ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluators" (
  "evaluator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluator */,
  "evaluator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the evaluator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the evaluator */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the evaluator belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the evaluator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the evaluator (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "disbursements" (
  "disbursement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disbursement */,
  "student_scholarship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student-scholarship record */,
  "disbursement_date" TEXT /* Date the disbursement was made */,
  "amount_disbursed" REAL /* Amount of the disbursement */,
  "financial_year" TEXT /* Financial year of the disbursement */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the disbursement (e.g., disbursed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("disbursement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_disbursements_student_scholarship_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_scholarship_id") REFERENCES student_scholarships ("student_scholarship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the record */,
  "gpa" REAL /* Grade Point Average (GPA) for the semester */,
  "credits_completed" INTEGER /* Total credits completed by the student */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the record (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_academic_records_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, apply) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., application form, disbursement record) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access event (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_aid" (
  "financial_aid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial aid form */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the financial aid form */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the financial aid form in MB */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the form was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial aid form (e.g., submitted, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_aid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_aid_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation letter */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the recommendation letter */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the recommendation letter in MB */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date the letter was submitted */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the recommendation letter (e.g., submitted, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
